directive.title: Basic application shell with navigation structure

auditor.summary: The build implements the core layout architecture with header, sidebar, and main content areas, along with loading states and responsive design. However, it has two CRITICAL buildability issues: missing dependencies (lucide-react, tailwind-merge) that will prevent TypeScript compilation. Additionally, the use of 'use client' on the entire AppLayout prevents server-side rendering benefits, impacting performance targets. Accessibility is partially addressed but missing focus management. The code structure is sound but requires dependency fixes and architectural adjustments to meet all acceptance criteria.

top_issues.description: Imports from 'lucide-react' which is not in package.json dependencies. This will cause build failure.
Imports from 'tailwind-merge' which is not in package.json dependencies. This will cause build failure.

Uses 'use client' directive making the entire layout a client component, preventing server-side rendering of the shell. This negatively impacts initial load performance and the 1500ms Lighthouse target.
